title: Optimizing Performance: Lazy Loading and Code Splitting

questions.sentence: As modern web applications grow in size, loading the entire application at once can result in a slow initial experience for users.
Two powerful techniques to combat this are 'Code Splitting' and 'Lazy Loading'.
Code splitting involves breaking your large JavaScript bundle into smaller, manageable chunks.
Lazy loading is the practice of delaying the loading of these chunks until they are actually needed.
Implementing these strategies significantly reduces the initial bundle size, leading to faster load times and a more responsive feel for the end user.
